message:
test(aws): verify athena patterns work through aws-vault / aws-sso wrappers

Review-pass regression coverage: common MFA/role-assumption tooling
invokes AWS CLI as `aws-vault exec prod -- aws athena …` or
`aws-sso exec -A prod aws …`. The `aws\b.*?\bathena\b` anchor
introduced in 17a54e3 correctly threads through both the outer `aws`
in `aws-vault`/`aws-sso` and the inner literal `aws`. Verify this
so we notice if the pattern ever regresses into a tighter form.

Also covers the combined case of wrapper + global flags:
`aws-vault exec prod -- aws --profile inner athena start-query-execution
--query-string 'DROP DATABASE x'`.

No code change — pattern already handles this. Test only.
